rate_limits.global_limit: 130,000 requests per 10 seconds per application across all tenants

service_specific_limits.outlook_mail_and_calendar: 10,000 requests per 10-minute window per app ID and mailbox combination (approx. 16.7 RPS)
service_specific_limits.teams_meeting_apis: 4 requests per second (RPS) per app per tenant
service_specific_limits.identity_and_access_management: 70,000 requests per 5 minutes for multi-tenant apps; 60 requests per minute for personal accounts
service_specific_limits.subscriptions_webhooks: 500 requests per 20 seconds per app per tenant for management operations (POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE)
service_specific_limits.viva_engage: 10 requests per user per app within a 30-second period

rate_limits.throttling_behavior: Returns HTTP 429 (Too Many Requests) with a 'Retry-After' header indicating the wait time in seconds.

flows: Client Credentials Flow: Used for server-to-server/daemon applications without user interaction (requires Application Permissions).
Authorization Code Flow: Used for interactive applications where a user signs in (requires Delegated Permissions).
configuration_requirements: Application must be registered in the Microsoft Entra ID (formerly Azure AD) portal.
Requires a Client ID (Application ID), Tenant ID, and either a Client Secret or Certificate.
Admin consent is mandatory for all 'Application' permissions and high-privilege 'Delegated' permissions.

effort_recommendation.rationale: No native node - requires HTTP Request configuration
